original.query: I’m trying to schedule a recurring weekly activity for me and my cousins, but there’s already one day that’s basically “blocked off” because we usually all meet up as part of an ongoing family routine. If I want to avoid conflicts, which day of the week should I treat as unavailable—and what’s the underlying family reason it’s blocked?
